name: SEO Drift Monitor
description_en: Baseline a page's SEO state, then detect regressions when the page changes—watching schema, headings, meta tags, canonical, and Core Web Vitals—and generate visual before/after reports with fix recommendations.
description_zh: 为页面的 SEO 状态建立基线,在页面变更后检测回归——监控结构化数据、标题层级、meta 标签、canonical 与 Core Web Vitals——并生成可视化的前后对比报告与修复建议。
long_en: A defensive regression monitor that protects existing SEO work from being silently broken by edits or redeploys, rather than a ranking-manipulation tool.
long_zh: 一个防御性的回归监控:防止已有的 SEO 成果被改动或重新部署悄悄破坏,而非排名操纵工具。
sec_note_en: Fetches and snapshots the pages you specify for comparison; analysis is read-only and reports are written locally.
sec_note_zh: 会抓取并快照你指定的页面用于对比;分析为只读,报告写在本地。
